name: sfagent
description: Salesforce terminal agent powered by the Models API — a Claude Code-like experience for Salesforce developers

scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.release:version:patch: npm version patch -m 'Bump package.json version to %s'
scripts.release:version:minor: npm version minor -m 'Bump package.json version to %s'
scripts.release:version:major: npm version major -m 'Bump package.json version to %s'
scripts.release:run: npm run release:check && npm run release:push && npm run release:create

author: javrrr
